NegotiateSemanticContext.description:
SAO-specific semantic context for ``kind='negotiate'`` messages.

Carries a full NegMAS SAO negotiation snapshot so that receivers have
complete mechanism state, the latest response, and optionally the NMI
configuration — all in one well-typed envelope.
NegotiateSemanticContext.title: NegotiateSemanticContext

PayloadRef.description: A reference to where payload content is stored.
PayloadRef.title: PayloadRef

ResponseType.description:
Possible responses to offers during a NegMAS negotiation round.

NegMAS source: negmas.gb.common.ResponseType
ResponseType.title: ResponseType

SAONMI.description:
NegotiatorMechanismInterface configuration snapshot for SAO.

NegMAS source: negmas.sao.common.SAONMI (frozen attrs, inherits NegotiatorMechanismInterface)

Omissions vs. the real SAONMI:
- ``_mechanism`` back-reference (internal, not serialisable)
- ``time_limit`` and ``n_steps`` computed fields (derive at runtime)

All NegotiatorMechanismInterface base fields are present with defaults so
this model can be built from a plain dict / JSON snapshot without needing
a live mechanism object.
SAONMI.title: SAONMI

SAOResponse.description:
A single negotiator response in one SAO round.
Encapsulates the decision (accept / reject / end / …) plus an optional offer.

NegMAS source: negmas.sao.common.SAOResponse
SAOResponse.title: SAOResponse

SAOState.description:
Full mechanism state for the Stacked Alternating Offers (SAO) protocol.

NegMAS source: negmas.sao.common.SAOState
Fields are declared in addition to those inherited from GBState / MechanismState.
SAOState.title: SAOState

ThreadState.description:
Per-thread state in a GB (Generalized Bargaining) negotiation round.

NegMAS source: negmas.gb.common.ThreadState
ThreadState.title: ThreadState

negotiate.description:
A negotiation-round message backed by NegMAS SAO semantics.

Unlike other kinds, ``semantic_context`` is typed as
:class:`NegotiateSemanticContext` instead of the generic
:class:`SemanticContext`, carrying a full SAO state snapshot,
the sender's response, and an optional NMI configuration.
negotiate.title: SSTPNegotiateMessage

CommitMessage.description:
A state-commit message.

All general optional fields that are optional on other kinds become
**required** here (per the spec's Commit-Specific Extensions section).
CommitMessage.title: CommitMessage
